channel.title: Parlor Room
channel.description: Latest releases from Parlor Room on Dropout.tv

item.title: Thirsty Sword Lesbians
item.description:
GMs Persephone, Brennan, Jasmine, and Aabria play the angsty, queer TTRPG Thirsty Sword Lesbians.

Duration: 1:25:27

Tags: Parlor Room, becca scott, board games, party games, tabletop rpg, role playing, strategy, problem solving, shenanigans, persephone valentine, brennan lee mulligan, jasmine bhullar, aabria iyengar

item.title: Taboo
item.description:
Rekha, Nnamdi, Patrick, Oscar, and Katie play the party game Taboo and try not to get tongue tied.

Duration: 43:57

Tags: Parlor Room, becca scott, board games, party games, tabletop rpg, role playing, strategy, problem solving, shenanigans, rekha shankar, nnamdi ngwe, patrick mcdonald, oscar montoya, katie marovitch
